Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Latari Forest]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 1''' — Latari Forest is a location where villagers tell stories about a demon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — The Latari Forest is where the encounter takes place.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — The wagons have stopped at the northwestern edge of the Latari Forest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Simon's father was killed at the edge of the Latari Forest.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — The Latari Forest is located near the road to Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — The Latari Forest is a location where Indirial saw an illusion of Nerissa.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — Myria is a village near the Latari Forest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Kai is in a clearing at the center of Latari Forest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — The Hanging Tree is located at the center of Latari Forest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — The Valinhall Incarnation's grave is located at the center of the Latari Forest.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Kai's trips into the Latari Forest kept him sane.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
